channel_relationships: The tracked catalog maps out a cohesive learning matrix balancing low-level foundational education with high-level enterprise deployment. While Andrej Karpathy and StatQuest build core algorithmic intuition around transformer nodes and mathematical parameters, channels like Matthew Berman, Wes Roth, and Matt Wolfe track the rapid operational execution loops of agentic networks and open-weight infrastructure scales. This system is contextualized by the advanced multi-modal visual systems of Two Minute Papers and the institutional engineering histories of the Lex Fridman Podcast.
